title: Allogene Therapeutics (NasdaqGS:ALLO) Stock Forecast & Analyst Predictions
text: Simply Wall St provides stock analysis and forecasts for Allogene Therapeutics. The platform aggregates analyst ratings and price targets, showing Strong Buy consensus with average price target of $8.71. Analysis covers financial metrics including cash position extending to Q1 2029, net losses expected to narrow as pipeline advances, and clinical trial risk/reward profile. The platform highlights key catalysts including ALPHA3 trial readouts and FDA decisions on ALLO-329 in autoimmune indications.
